Metadata.title: Human Firewall | AI-Powered Phishing Detection
Metadata.description: Protect organizations from phishing attacks using AI-powered email analysis, URL scanning, and employee awareness training.

Hero.subtitle: Human Firewall analyzes suspicious links, payment requests, and messages before they can harm you.

Analyzer.description: Protecting your digital life across every touchpoint. Our AI engines analyze threats in real-time, no matter where they come from.
Analyzer.poweredBy: Analysis powered by Advanced Neural Models
Analyzer.lockedDesc: Join the network to access historical threat data, community warnings, and advanced forensic reports.

upi.title: UPI Analyzer
upi.desc: Analyze suspicious UPI payment requests and detect fraud patterns before you pay.

url.title: URL Analyzer
url.desc: Real-time URL reputation and phishing detection. Our sandbox analyzes destination content and more.

message.title: Message Analyzer
message.desc: Social engineering detection for SMS, WhatsApp, or Emails. Our NLP engine identifies urgency.
message.placeholder: Paste the message content here for deep neural analysis...

Features.title: Powerful
Features.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed to build an unbreakable digital perimeter.

items.title: AI Phishing Detection
items.desc: Advanced neural networks analyze content for social engineering and phishing markers.

items.title: URL Threat Intelligence
items.desc: Real-time scanning and classification of suspicious links and malicious domains.

items.title: UPI Fraud Detection
items.desc: Identify suspicious payment requests and fraudulent UPI handles instantly.

items.title: Browser Protection
items.desc: Stay protected while browsing with our real-time malicious site blocking.

items.title: Email Security Scanner
items.desc: Deep scan email headers and attachments for hidden cyber threats.

items.title: Security Awareness Training
items.desc: Educate users with simulated attacks and behavioral security insights.

HowItWorks.title: How It
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to protect yourself from sophisticated digital scams.

steps.title: Scan suspicious message or link
steps.desc: Simply paste any suspicious URL, UPI ID, or message content into our analyzer tools.

steps.title: AI detection engine analyzes patterns
steps.desc: Our advanced neural networks process the input to detect phishing markers.

steps.title: Receive instant trust score and warning
steps.desc: Get immediate results with a trust score and detailed recommendations.
